---
title: "Week 2 --- Tidy Data & ggplot"
subtitle: "May 25 – 29, 2026"
resources:
  - "day1-demo.R"
  - "day2-follow-along.R"
  - "day3-activity.R"
---

This week we get everyone set up with R, RStudio, and Quarto, and cover the absolute basics of the R language. By Friday you'll have written your first reproducible document and learned the pipe.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Slides & Notes | Code & Data |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mon May 25 | 	**No class - Memorial Day** | - | - |
| Tue May 26 | Data frames · intro to data graphics | [Slides](day1-data-frames-slides.html) · [Page](day1-data-frames-page.html) · [PDF](day1-data-frames.pdf) | [day1-activity.R](day1-activity.R){download="day1-activity.R"} |
| Wed May 27 | 	ggplot2 basics · frames, glyphs, scales, facets | [Slides](day2-ggplot-basics-slides.html) · [Page](day2-ggplot-basics-page.html) · [PDF](day2-ggplot-basics.pdf) | [day2-activity.R](day2-activity.R){download="day2-activity.R"} |
| Thu May 28 | 	Multivariable graphics · specifying graphs · axes & labels | [Slides](day3-multivariable-slides.html) · [Page](day3-multivariable-page.html) · [PDF](day3-multivariable.pdf) | [day3-activity.R](day3-activity.R){download="day3-activity.R"} |
| Fri May 29 | **Quiz 2** · graphics critique activity | [Slides](day4-critique-slides.html) · [Page](day4-critique-page.html) · [PDF](day4-critique.pdf) | [day4-activity.qmd](day4-activity.qmd){download="day4-activity.qmd"} |

## Due this week

**Readings (due at 9:35 a.m. on Perusall)**

- *(Optional)* **Monday:** *Data Computing* Ch 1 (§1.1–1.5) --- what tidy data is
- **Tuesday:** *Data Computing* Ch 2 (§2.1–2.8) --- R, RStudio, vectors, objects
- **Wednesday:** *Data Computing* Ch 3 (§3.1–3.5) --- basic R commands
- **Thursday:** *Data Computing* Ch 4 (§4.1–4.7) --- files and Rmd documents
  - *(Optional)* *R For Data Science* Ch 28 --- Quarto
- **Friday:** *Data Computing* §3.6 --- chaining syntax (the pipe)

**Assignments (Canvas & In-class)**

- **Wednesday May 20:** HW 0 (setup confirmation) --- due 11:59 p.m. on Canvas
- **Friday May 22:** HW 1 --- due 11:59 p.m. on Canvas
- **Friday May 22:** **Quiz 1** --- in class

## Heads up for next week

- *Data Computing* Ch 5 (§5.1–5.6) for Tuesday May 26 --- graphics intro.
- **No class Monday May 25** (Memorial Day).
